segments.speaker: BREDA
segments.en: Hello, Wayside Camera Club, Breda speaking.
segments.zh: 你好，路边摄影俱乐部，我是布雷达。

segments.speaker: DAN
segments.en: Oh, hello, um, my name's Dan and I'd like to join your club.
segments.zh: 哦，你好，嗯，我叫丹，我想加入你们俱乐部。

segments.speaker: BREDA
segments.en: That's great, Dan.
segments.zh: 太好了，丹。我们有申请表——你想在电话里填吗？这样你可以问任何问题。

segments.speaker: BREDA
segments.en: We have an application form – would you like to complete it over the phone, then you can ask any questions you might have?

segments.speaker: DAN
segments.en: Oh, yes, thanks.
segments.zh: 哦，好的，谢谢。

segments.speaker: BREDA
segments.en: OK, so what's your family name?
segments.zh: 好的，你姓什么？

segments.speaker: DAN
segments.en: It's Green – Dan Green.
segments.zh: 格林——丹·格林。

segments.speaker: BREDA
segments.en: So – can I take your email address?
segments.zh: 那么——能给我你的邮箱地址吗？

segments.speaker: DAN
segments.en: Yes, it's dan1068@market.com.
segments.zh: 好的，是 dan1068@market.com。

segments.speaker: BREDA
segments.en: Thanks.
segments.zh: 谢谢。那您的家庭住址呢？

segments.speaker: BREDA
segments.en: And what about your home address?

segments.speaker: DAN
segments.en: Well, I'm about ten miles away from your club in Peacetown.
segments.zh: 嗯，我离你们在和平镇的俱乐部大约十英里。我住在那儿的一栋房子里。

segments.speaker: DAN
segments.en: I live in a house there.

segments.speaker: BREDA
segments.en: OK, so what's the house number and street?
segments.zh: 好的，那门牌号和街道是什么？

segments.speaker: DAN
segments.en: It's 52 Marrowfield Street.
segments.zh: 马罗菲尔德街52号。

segments.speaker: BREDA
segments.en: Is that M-A double R-O-W-F-I-E-L-D?
segments.zh: 是M-A双R-O-W-F-I-E-L-D吗？

segments.speaker: DAN
segments.en: That's right.
segments.zh: 没错。

segments.speaker: BREDA
segments.en: ... and that's Peacetown, you said?
segments.zh: ……您刚说的是和平镇，对吗？

segments.speaker: DAN
segments.en: Uhuh.
segments.zh: 嗯嗯。

segments.speaker: BREDA
segments.en: So how did you hear about our club?
segments.zh: 那你是怎么知道我们俱乐部的？上网查的吗？

segments.speaker: BREDA
segments.en: Did you look on the internet?

segments.speaker: DAN
segments.en: I usually do that, but this time, well, I was talking to a relative the other day and he suggested it.
segments.zh: 我一般会上网查，但这次嘛，前几天我跟一个亲戚聊天，他推荐的。

segments.speaker: BREDA
segments.en: Oh, is he a member too?
segments.zh: 哦，他也是会员吗？

segments.speaker: DAN
segments.en: He belongs to another club – but he'd heard good things about yours.
segments.zh: 他参加了另一个俱乐部——但他听说过你们俱乐部的好评。

segments.speaker: BREDA
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好的。那你加入俱乐部希望得到什么呢？

segments.speaker: BREDA
segments.en: So what do you hope to get from joining?

segments.speaker: DAN
segments.en: Well, one thing that really interests me is the competitions that you have.
segments.zh: 嗯，我特别感兴趣的是你们举办的比赛。我很喜欢参加。

segments.speaker: DAN
segments.en: I enjoy entering those.

segments.speaker: BREDA
segments.en: Right.
segments.zh: 好的。还有别的吗？

segments.speaker: BREDA
segments.en: Anything else?

segments.speaker: DAN
segments.en: Well, I also like to socialise with other photographers.
segments.zh: 嗯，我也喜欢和其他摄影师社交。

segments.speaker: BREDA
segments.en: That's great.
segments.zh: 太好了。那您想要哪种会员资格呢？

segments.speaker: BREDA
segments.en: So what type of membership would you like?

segments.speaker: DAN
segments.en: What are the options?
segments.zh: 有哪些选择？

segments.speaker: BREDA
segments.en: It's £30 a year for full membership or £20 a year if you're an associate.
segments.zh: 正式会员每年30英镑，准会员每年20英镑。

segments.speaker: DAN
segments.en: I think I'll go for the full membership, then.
segments.zh: 那我选正式会员吧。

segments.speaker: BREDA
segments.en: That's a good idea because you can't vote in meetings with an associate membership.
segments.zh: 这是个好主意，因为准会员不能在会议上投票。

segments.speaker: BREDA
segments.en: If I could just find out a bit more about you ...
segments.zh: 我再多了解您一些情况……

segments.speaker: DAN
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好的。

segments.speaker: BREDA
segments.en: So you said you wanted to compete – have you ever won any photography competitions?
segments.zh: 您刚才说想参加比赛——您赢得过摄影比赛吗？

segments.speaker: DAN
segments.en: Not yet, but I have entered three in the past.
segments.zh: 还没有，但我过去参加过三次。

segments.speaker: BREDA
segments.en: Oh, that's interesting.
segments.zh: 哦，那挺有意思的。那你给我讲讲那些经历吧？先从第一个说起。

segments.speaker: BREDA
segments.en: So why don't you tell me something about those?

segments.speaker: BREDA
segments.en: Let's start with the first one.

segments.speaker: DAN
segments.en: Well, the theme was entitled 'Domestic Life'.
segments.zh: 嗯，那个主题叫“家庭生活”。

segments.speaker: BREDA
segments.en: I see – so it had to be something related to the home?
segments.zh: 明白了——所以得跟家有关？

paraphrase.explain: 题干要求填写街道名，原文直接给出'52 Marrowfield Street'，因此Marrowfield即为答案。
